field.name: worksheet_properties
field.eval:
{ '7d37c31a412cf220': ref('res_partner_23'), '7d37c31a412cf221': ref('sale_order_20'), '7d37c31a412cf223': obj().search([('sale_order_id', 'in', [ref('sale_order_20')])], limit=1).id, '7d37c31a412cf225': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=5)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf226': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=5, seconds=40)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), '7d37c31a412cf227': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=5, hours=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), '7d37c31a412cf228': ref('sale_order_template_3'), '7d37c31a412cf229': True, '7d37c31a412cf22a_html': '

Done installation properly

', '7d37c31a412cf22b': False }

field.name: worksheet_properties
field.eval:
{ '7d37c31a412cf220': ref('res_partner_16'), '7d37c31a412cf221': ref('sale_order_23'), '7d37c31a412cf223': obj().search([('sale_order_id', '=', ref('sale_order_23'))], limit=1).id, '7d37c31a412cf225': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=6)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf226': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=6, seconds=1600)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), '7d37c31a412cf227': (datetime.now() - relativedelta(days=6, hours=4)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), '7d37c31a412cf228': ref('sale_order_template_2'), '7d37c31a412cf229': True, '7d37c31a412cf22a_html': '
